caddyfile.tmLanguage.json is copied from the official VS Code extension:
https://github.com/caddyserver/vscode-caddyfile (MIT License, Copyright Matthew Penner).

Update occasionally to match editor highlighting:
curl -sL -o assets/vendor/caddyfile.tmLanguage.json \
  "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/caddyserver/vscode-caddyfile/master/syntaxes/caddyfile.tmLanguage.json"
